final_prompt.prompt:

Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic gemstone lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include refractive fire and brilliance inside the sapphire, hyper-detailed surface textures
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the luxurious, high-jewelry aesthetic
Avoid:
